info.name: Huly Platform API
info.description: Huly exposes programmatic access through the Node.js SDK @hcengineering/api-client rather than a documented public HTTP REST API with stable endpoint paths. The SDK connects to the platform transactor over WebSocket (connect) or via a REST client (connectRest), authenticating with email/password or a token, and offers document-oriented operations. The items below describe the supported SDK operations; they are not fixed public REST endpoints and intentionally carry no fabricated URLs.

info.name: connect - Open a WebSocket transactor connection

items.docs: SDK: connect(url, { workspace, email, password } | { workspace, token }). Establishes a persistent WebSocket connection to the Huly Platform transactor. No fixed public REST path is documented.

info.name: connectRest - Open a REST client connection

items.docs: SDK: connectRest(url, { workspace, email, password } | { workspace, token }). Uses standard HTTP requests against the platform. No fixed public REST endpoint paths/schemas are published; access is via the SDK.
SDK: client.findOne(_class, query, options). Returns the first document matching the query.
SDK: client.findAll(_class, query, options). Returns documents with filtering, sorting, and pagination.
SDK: client.createDoc(_class, space, attributes). Creates a new document in the specified space.
SDK: client.updateDoc(_class, space, objectId, operations). Modifies an existing document.
SDK: client.removeDoc(_class, space, objectId). Deletes a document.
SDK: client.addCollection(...). Creates an attached (collection) document.
SDK: client.updateCollection(...). Modifies an attached document.
SDK: client.removeCollection(...). Removes an attached document.

info.name: createMixin - Add a mixin to a document

items.docs: SDK: client.createMixin(...). Adds a mixin to an existing document.
SDK: client.updateMixin(...). Modifies an existing mixin on a document.
